summary:
Agent1 recommends a prospective cohort study because it allows continuous monitoring of fat content differences longitudinally between groups, providing more accurate comparisons free from recall bias common in other designs.
``` ```markdown
A prospective cohort study is ideal for comparing fat content in breast milk between pre-term and term infants, offering real-time data collection that reduces bias.
```
